name: Tired to Fall: Winter
author: Poki
description: Tired to Fall: Winter is a charming puzzle platformer game, where you embark on a journey as a little autumn leaf searching for answers in the cold dark winter. It's a long journey scaling up the green tree, but you're never alone as you can enlist the help of red and green little leafy friends. You can launch red buddies that bounce off ice crystals and can create ladders, or you can create mid-air platforms if you launch a green buddy. Can you reach the top of the tree to find out the secrets of the seasons? How do I play Tired to Fall: Winter? Use the mouse to click on menu buttons. Move Left: A or the left arrow key; Move Right: D or the right arrow key; Jump: Space bar, W, up arrow key, or X; Glide: hold down any of the jump buttons; Launch Buddy: C; Who created Tired to Fall: Winter? Tired to Fall: Winter is created by Havana24. Play their other games on Poki: Break the Siesta , Hefty Shaman Deluxe , Jumpignons , Klung , and Tired to Fall ! How can I play Tired to Fall: Winter for free? You can play Tired to Fall: Winter for free on Poki. Can I play Tired to Fall: Winter on mobile devices and desktop? Tired to Fall: Winter can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
